patterns_discovered.evidence: Session logs show PHASE 0 (Deep Codebase Investigation) with systematic exploration of crate structure, Cargo.toml dependencies, and main.rs module organization before implementation
patterns_discovered.applicability: Multi-step feature development benefits from explicit investigation phase to understand integration points

patterns_discovered.evidence: main.rs imports 11+ internal modules (doctor, dispatcher, factory, gantt, list, serve, etc.) each handling distinct subcommands; suggests plugin-like extensibility for new bop commands
patterns_discovered.applicability: Future bop subcommands (doctor, gantt, etc.) can be added as new modules following existing patterns

patterns_discovered.evidence: Spec requires checking ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME env var for Zellij detection; output differs based on env state (inside vs outside Zellij)
patterns_discovered.applicability: Conditional CLI behavior based on runtime environment enables seamless integration with container/terminal multiplexer contexts

patterns_discovered.evidence: Implementation plan includes discrete acceptance criteria (detect Zellij, print quick-start, bop doctor exists, make check passes) with status markers
patterns_discovered.applicability: Structured verification prevents silent feature gaps; each criterion has explicit completion signal
